channel.title: Capital Market - Live News
channel.description: Latest market news and updates from Capital Market

item.title: Bharat Electronics secures Rs 6,795-cr orders in March
item.description: According to an exchange filing, the newly acquired contracts include supply of mountain radars for the Ministry of Defence, avionics packages for the Light Combat Aircraft (LCA) from Hindustan Aeronautics, major export order for communication equipment, electronic fuzes, strategic components, upgrades, spares, services etc. According to an exchange filing, the newly acquired contracts include supply of mountain radars for the Ministry of Defence, avionics packages for the Light Combat Aircraft (LCA) from Hindustan Aeronautics, major export order for communication equipment, electronic fuzes, strategic components, upgrades, spares, services etc. Bharat Electronics (BEL) is a Navratna PSU under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India. It manufactures electronic products and systems for the army, navy, and air force. The company’s standalone net profit jumped 20.81% to Rs 1,590.06 crore on a 23.72% rise in revenue from operations to Rs 7,121.98 crore in Q3 FY26 over Q3 FY25. The scrip slipped 1.03% to Rs 400.60 on the BSE. Category: Hot Pursuit
